docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,827.10 FILED BY BOSCH, MICHELLE BOSCH, MARICAR AS TO DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MICHELLE BOSCH, MARICAR AS TO DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATHERINE RIVERS FILED BY DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS MICHELLE BOSCH AND MARICAR BOSCH ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC (KATHERINE RIVERS) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSCH, MICHELLE BOSCH, MARICAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 830 EDDY ST, LLC
